REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: HAVING CONSIDERED THREE CLAIMS PRESENTED TO THE COURT, THE CLAIM OF RIZING CAPITAL 8, LLC IS SENIOR AND SUPERIOR TO OTHER CLAIMS AND SHALL BE PAID OUT OF THE FUNDS ON FILE WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $33,774 (AND INTEREST IF ANY ACCRUED SINCE JULY 31, 2024). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MINI MINUTES FOR APR-03-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-03-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'S MOTION TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 2924J AND TO DISCHARGE PETITIONER, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON APRIL 11, 2024, AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL FORECLOSURE RELATED CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. THE RESPONDING AND NON-OPPOSING PARTIES ARE TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS ON THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN APRIL 5, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'S MOTION TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 2924J AND TO DISCHARGE PEITIONER IS GRANTED AS REQUESTED. PETITIONER SHALL DEPOSIT THE SURPLUS FUNDS FORTHWITH AND SHALL BE THEREAFTER DISCHARGED. UPON RECEIPT OF THE FUNDS, THE CLERK OF THE COURT SHALL SET HEARINGS ON THE CLAIMS BY RIZING CAPITAL 8, LLC; 1081-1083-1085 MISSISSIPPI STREET HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION; AND OLUSOJI FANOIKI/MATTHEW ARBER. calendar.matters:
HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Having considered three claims presented to the Court, the claim of Rizing Capital 8, LLC is senior and superior to other claims and shall be paid out of the funds on file with the Court in the amount of $33,774 (and interest if any accrued since July 31, 2024). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Peitioner
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'S MOTION TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 2924J AND TO DISCHARGE PEITIONER is GRANTED as requested. Petitioner shall deposit the surplus funds forthwith and shall be thereafter discharged. Upon receipt of the funds, the Clerk of the Court shall set hearings on the claims by Rizing Capital 8, LLC; 1081-1083-1085 Mississippi Street Homeowner's Association; and Olusoji Fanoiki/Matthew Arber.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Peitioner
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Continued To Apr-11-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'s Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Peitioner.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on April 11, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all foreclosure related cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. The responding and non-opposing parties are to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings on the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than April 5, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
